invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破0.115（低于当前低点）或资金费率Z-score转为正值且高于+50%（空头压力缓解），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 0.115 (below current low) or funding Z-score turns positive and above +50% (short pressure eases).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破2750（关键支撑）或资金费率Z-score升至+50%以上（多头拥挤），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 2750 (key support) or funding Z-score rises above +50% (long crowding).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破850（关键支撑）或资金费率Z-score转为正值且高于+50%（空头压力缓解），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 850 (key support) or funding Z-score turns positive and above +50% (short pressure eases).
